_comment: Deterministic fixtures for critique_ui testing. Each fixture references a small local image + expected metadata. Provider responses are never stored — these are for scoring citation coverage, retrieval mode, and fallback behavior.

fixtures._comment: Desktop dashboard screenshot — expects strong corpus matches in dashboard/data-table patterns
fixtures.productContext: A dashboard for tracking sales KPIs

fixtures._comment: Portrait mobile flow — expects mobile-filtered retrieval, onboarding/landing patterns
fixtures.productContext: A mobile onboarding flow for a fintech app

fixtures._comment: Abstract/ambiguous screenshot — expects low similarity, fallback to structured retrieval
